title: Fourth Pestoriv Conference

The '''Fourth Pestoriv Conference''' was a conference that took place<ref name="Specter">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref> at some point during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] before his [[Death/Legends|death]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="Date" /> It was the fourth of the [[Pestoriv Conferences]],<ref name="Specter" /> which shared their name with the [[Pestoriv system/Legends|Pestoriv system]] located in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> The Conference was completely open and fully documented, including on a [[Datacard/Legends|datacard]] labeled ''[[Listings of the Fourth Pestoriv Conference]]'', kept by Palpatine in his [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]] storehouse on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]].<ref name="Specter" />

In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]],<ref name="DateSotP">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Specter of the Past]]'' to [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]</ref> [[Treasure hunting/Legends|treasure hunter]] [[Lak Jit]] recovered the datacard and was forced to surrender it to [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[High Councilor]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. While inspecting the datacard, Organa Solo mentally noted that, unless the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] possessed a secret version of the Conference's events, it was not particularly important, due to how well the Conference had been documented.<ref name="Specter" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Fourth Pestoriv Conference was mentioned in the novel ''[[Specter of the Past]]'', written by [[Timothy Zahn]] and published in [[1997]] as part one of the ''[[Star Wars: The Hand of Thrawn Duology]]''.<ref name="Specter" />
